1. Step one
2. Step two

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or logs if available.

## Environment

- **Node.js version:** (e.g., 22.14.0)
- **Qualixar OS version:** (e.g., 2.1.1)
